# Access API, gRPC: AccessService.SearchActions

Searches actions the subject can perform on the resource.

## gRPC request

```proto
rpc SearchActions (SearchActionsRequest) returns (SearchActionsResponse)
```

## SearchActionsRequest

```json
{
  "subject": {
    "type": "string",
    "id": "string",
    "properties": {}
  },
  "resource": {
    "type": "string",
    "id": "string",
    "properties": {}
  },
  "context": {},
  "page": {
    "limit": 0,
    "token": "string",
    "properties": {}
  }
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| subject | Subject | No description. |
| resource | Resource | No description. |
| context | Struct | No description. |
| page | PageRequest | No description. |
